# FILE: to_r.R
```
# Translate to R code
example = function() {
  project.dir = "C:/libraries/repbox/projects_reg/testsupp"

  core = readRDS(file.path(project.dir, "regdb","reg_core.Rds"))
  regs = core$reg
  varinfo = readRDS(file.path(project.dir, "regdb","base_varinfo.Rds"))
  regvars =  varinfo$regvar

  step = 3
  reg = regs[regs$step==step,]
  regvar = regvars[regvars$step==step,]

  code_df = reg_stata_to_r_code(reg, regvar, opts = code_options(add_function=TRUE, add_restorepoint = TRUE))
}


code_options = function(prefer_sandwich=FALSE, prefer_summary=FALSE, add_broom=TRUE, add_function=FALSE, add_restorepoint=FALSE) {
  list(prefer_sandwich=prefer_sandwich, prefer_summary=prefer_summary, add_broom=add_broom, add_function=add_function, add_restorepoint=add_restorepoint)
}

reg_stata_to_r_code = function(reg, regvar, regxvar, cmdpart, prefer="fixest", opts=code_options()) {
  restore.point("reg_stata_to_r_code")

  r_cmd = get_stata_to_r_cmd(reg$cmd, prefer)
  if (isTRUE(r_cmd == "no_trans")) {
    return(NULL)
  } else if (is.na(r_cmd)) {
    stop(paste0("The Stata command ", reg$cmd, " is neither implemented for translation nor specified in stata_cmds_without_r_translation()"))
  }

  args = list(reg=reg, regvar=regvar,regxvar, cmdpart=cmdpart, opts=opts)
  fun = paste0("stata_to_r_code_",r_cmd)
  res = do.call(fun, args)
  res
}

reg_stata_to_r_formula = function(reg, regvar, regxvar, cmdpart, prefer="fixest", opts=code_options()) {
  restore.point("reg_stata_to_r_formula")

  r_cmd = get_stata_to_r_cmd(reg$cmd, prefer)
  if (isTRUE(r_cmd == "no_trans")) {
    return(NULL)
  } else if (is.na(r_cmd)) {
    stop(paste0("The Stata command ", reg$cmd, " is neither implemented for translation nor specified in stata_cmds_without_r_translation()"))
  }

  args = list(regvar=regvar,regxvar, cmdpart=cmdpart)
  fun = paste0("regvar_to_formula_",r_cmd)
  res = do.call(fun, args)
  as.formula(res)
}

get_stata_to_r_cmd = function(cmd, prefer = NULL) {
  restore.point("get_stata_to_r_cmd")
  df = stata_to_r_cmds_df()
  rows = df$stata_cmd == cmd
  if (length(rows)==0) return(NA)
  r_cmds = df$r_cmd[rows]
  if (length(rows)==1 | length(prefer)==0) return(r_cmds[1])
  ma = match(r_cmds, prefer)
  best = which.min(ma)
  if (length(best)==0) return(r_cmds[1])
  r_cmds[best[1]]
}


stata_to_r_cmds_df = function(cmd) {
  li = list(
    # If you add commands here make to sure that you update the to_r_fixest.R code
    fixest.. = c("regress","reg", "ivregress","ivreg","ivreg2","reghdfe","xtreg","areg","ppmlhdfe","logit","xtlogit","probit","xtprobit","dprobit"),
    lm.. = c("regress","reg"),
    ivreg.. = c("ivregress","ivreg","ivreg2"),
    quantreg.. = c("qreg"),
    # Note that parmest does return coefficients not marginal
    # effects for dprobit. So we don't use mfx
    #mfx... = c("dprobit"),
    tobit.. = c("tobit")
  )
  stata_cmd = unlist(li)
  r_cmd = str.left.of(names(stata_cmd),"..")
  data.frame(stata_cmd=stata_cmd,r_cmd=r_cmd,row.names = NULL)
}

add_reg_function_code = function(code_df,add_results=TRUE, add_restore_point=isTRUE(opts$add_restore_point), opts=NULL) {
  restore.point("add_reg_function_code")
  fun_header = paste0("function(dat,...){")
  rp_code = paste0('restore.point("regfun_',sample.int(1e10,1),'")')

  if (add_results) {
    results = paste0("results = list(reg=reg")
    if ("rcmd" %in% code_df$part) {
      results = paste0(results, ",rcmd=rcmd")
    }

    if ("sum" %in% code_df$part) {
      results = paste0(results, ",sum=sum")
    }
    if ("tidy" %in% code_df$part) {
      results = paste0(results, ",ct=ct")
    }
    if ("glance" %in% code_df$part) {
      results = paste0(results, ",glance=glance")
    }
    results = paste0(results,")")
    results_df = tibble(part="results", code=results)
  } else {
    results_df = NULL
  }
  fun_footer = paste0("return(results)\n}")

  if (add_restore_point) {
    rp_code = paste0('restore.point("regfun_',sample.int(1e10,1),'")')
    head_df = tibble(part=c("fun_header","restorepoint"),code = c(fun_header, rp_code))
  } else {
    head_df = tibble(part=c("fun_header"), code = c(fun_header))
  }
  foot_df = tibble(part=c("fun_footer"), code = c(fun_footer))

  bind_rows(
    head_df,
    code_df,
    results_df,
    foot_df
  )
}

add_reg_broom_code = function(code_df, use_summary=any(code_df$part=="sum"), use_conf_int=TRUE) {
  broom_x = if (use_summary) "sum" else "reg"
  tidy_code = paste0('ct = broom::tidy(',broom_x,",conf.int=TRUE)")
  glance_code = paste0('glance = broom::glance(',broom_x,')')

  tidy_df = tibble(
    part = c("tidy","glance"),
    code = c(tidy_code, glance_code)
  )
  bind_rows(code_df, tidy_df)
}


quote_arg = function(arg) {
  quote = suppressWarnings(!has.substr(arg,"(") & is.na(as.numeric(arg)) & is.na(as.logical(arg)))
  ifelse(quote, paste0('"', arg,'"'), arg)
}

replace_regvar_prefix_sep = function(regvar, from="@", to=".") {
  regvar$cterm = gsub(from, to, regvar$cterm, fixed=TRUE)
  regvar$ia_cterm = gsub(from, to, regvar$ia_cterm, fixed=TRUE)
  regvar
}


extract_clustervar_from_se_args = function(se_args) {
  args = regdb_parse_se_args(se_args)
  clustervar = args[startsWith(names(args),"cluster")]
  clustervar
}
```
# END OF FILE: to_r.R

-----------------------------------------------------------


# FILE: to_r_tobit.R
```

stata_to_r_code_tobit = function(reg, regvar, regxvar, cmdpart, opts=code_options(), parts = list()) {
  restore.point("stata_to_r_code_mfx")

  # Ignore dropped regvars (if they are nor part of an interaction)
  #regvar = filter(regvar, !is_dropped | ia_cterm != cterm)

  # Currently we just use the fixest formula
  formula = regvar_to_formula_fixest(regvar, regxvar, cmdpart)

  rcmd = "tobit"

  library_code = paste0("library(AER)")
  rcmd_code = paste0('rcmd = "',rcmd,'"')
  # We use the default ssc arguments since they are closest to the
  # Stata defaults
  formula_code = paste0('formula = ', formula)

  arg_str = NULL
  if (reg$se_category == "robust") {
    arg_str = "robust = true"
  } else if (reg$se_category == "cluster") {
    clustervar = extract_clustervar_from_se_args(reg$se_args)
    arg_str = paste0('cluster = "', clustervar[1],'"')
    if (reg$se_type == "twoway") {
      stop("Two way clusters not yet implemented for tobit in R")
    }
  }
  arg_str = c(
    paste0("formula = formula"),
    paste0('data = dat'),
    arg_str
  )

  weight_var = regvar$cterm[regvar$role == "weight"]
  if (length(weight_var)==1) {
    arg_str = c(arg_str, paste0('weights = dat[["',weight_var,'"]]'))
  } else if (length(weight_var)>1) {
    stop("Cannot deal with mutliple weight variables.")
  }


  reg_code = paste0('reg = ', rcmd,'(', paste0(arg_str, collapse=","),")
class(reg) = 'survreg'")

  code_df = tibble(part = c("library", "rcmd","formula","reg"), code = c(library_code, rcmd_code,formula_code,reg_code))

  if (opts$add_broom) {
    code_df = add_reg_broom_code(code_df, use_summary=FALSE, use_conf_int=TRUE)
  }
  if (opts$add_function) {
    code_df = add_reg_function_code(code_df)
  }
  code_df
}

tidy.tobit <- function(x, ...) {
  class(x) <- "survreg"
  tidy(x, ...)
}
```
# END OF FILE: to_r_tobit.R

```
Author: Sebastian Kranz

Depends: repboxUtils, repboxDB, repboxReg, repboxRun, stringi, restorepoint
```

# FILE: dummy_tools.R
```

df_factors_to_int = function(dat) {
  is_fac = sapply(dat, function(x) is.character(x) | is.factor(x))
  cols = colnames(dat, is_fac)
  for (col in cols) {
    v = dat[[col]]
    iv = suppressWarnings(as.integer(v))
    # Was not originally a number
    if (!all(is.na(v)==is.na(iv))) {
      iv = match(v, sort(unique(v)))
    }
    dat[[col]] = iv
  }
  iv
}


dummy_set_to_factor = function(dat, cols, factor_vals = cols, use_ind = FALSE) {
  restore.point("dummy_set_to_factor")
  mat = as.matrix(dat[,cols])
  ind = max.col(mat)
  max_val = rowSums(mat)
  ind[max_val==0] = 0
  if (use_ind) return(ind)
  c("_empty_",as.character(factor_vals))[ind+1]
}




make_dummies = function(x, prefix = "dummy_") {
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    x = as.factor(x)
  }
  mm <- model.matrix(~x - 1, model.frame(~x - 1))
  colnames(mm) <- sub("^x", prefix, colnames(mm))
  return(mm)
}

is_dummy = function(val) {
  vals = unique(val, na.rm=TRUE)
  if (length(vals)==0) return(NA)
  all(vals==0 | vals==1)
}

```
# END OF FILE: dummy_tools.R

# FILE: id_to_seed.R
```
example = function() {
  artid <- c("pandp_95_12_45","aer_101_3_4", "aer_101_5_4")
  step = 101
  artid
  artid_step_to_seed(artid, step)

}

str_to_random_seed = function(str, max_int=2^31) {
  library(digest)
  hash_hex <- sapply(str, digest::digest, algo = "crc32", serialize = FALSE)
  seed_num <- as.numeric(paste0("0x", hash_hex))
  seed <- as.integer(seed_num %% max_int)
  seed
}


with_random_seed = function(expr, seed = 1234567890) {
  old.seed = get(".Random.seed", .GlobalEnv)
  set.seed(seed)
  ret = eval(expr)
  restore.point("with_random_seed")
  assign(".Random.seed", old.seed, .GlobalEnv)
  runif(1)
  return(ret)
}


artid_to_seed = function(artid) {
  str_to_random_seed(artid, 2^30)
}

artid_step_to_seed = function(artid, step) {
  str_to_random_seed(artid, 2^30) + step*10
}
```

# FILE: mr_cache.R
```
mrs_get_cache = function(mrs) {
  cache = .GlobalEnv$.METAREG_MER_CACHE
  if (is.null(cache) | isTRUE(cache$project_dir != mrs$project_dir)) {
    cache = new.env(parent=emptyenv())
    .GlobalEnv$.METAREG_MER_CACHE = cache
    cache$project_dir = mrs$project_dir
    cache$parcels = list()
  }
  cache
}



mrs_cache_get_parcels = function(mrs, parcel_names) {
  cache = mrs_get_cache(mrs)
  cache$parcels[intersect(parcel_names,names(cache$parcels))]

}

mrs_cache_store_parcels = function(mrs, parcels) {
  cache = mrs_get_cache(mrs)
  cache$parcels[names(parcels)] = parcels
  invisible(cache)
}
```
# END OF FILE: mr_cache.R

# FILE: mrs_example.R
```
mrs_example_code = function() {
  options(warn=2)
  project_dir = "~/repbox/projects_test/testsupp"
  library(repboxRun)
  repboxRun::repbox_run_project(project_dir, "stata")
  #rstudioapi::filesPaneNavigate(project_dir)


  # _METAREG_CODE_
  library(metaregTools)

  #artid = "aejapp_11_2_10"; step = 4
  artid = "testsupp"; step = 2
  what = "stats"
  opts = list()

  metaid = "cluster"
  projects_dir = "~/repbox/projects_test"
  project_dir = file.path(projects_dir,artid)

  code_dir = "~/repbox/metareg/metareg_cluster"
  setwd(code_dir)
  source("load_dep.R")


  # _FIXED_

  mrs = mrs_init(metaid, project_dir, step=step, opts=opts, what=what)
  setwd(mrs$meta_dir)
  mrs = mrs_load_reg_basics(mrs)

  # Determine coefficients to look_at
  look_at_opts = mrt_look_at_opts(max_look_at = 3)
  mrs = mrs_add_look_at(mrs,opts=look_at_opts)
  mrs$look_at


  rs = mrt_reg_spec(mrs)
  rs$formula
  rs_li = list(org=rs)

  dummy_to_fe = mrt_specifify_dummy_to_fe(mrs)
  if (length(dummy_to_fe)>0) {
    rs_fe = mrt_reg_spec(mrs, dummy_to_fe = dummy_to_fe)
    rs_li$fe = rs_fe
  } else {
    rs_fe = rs
  }

  if (rst_has_fe(rs)) {
    rs_lsdv = mrt_reg_spec_lsdv(mrs)
    rs_li$lsdv = rs_lsdv
  } else {
    rs_lsdv = rs
  }

  # _END_
}
```

# FILE: mrs_find_reg.R
```
# Loads data set of all regressions that can be used to filter appropriate regressions
example = function() {
  dir = repboxExplore::get_explore_dir()
  make_mrs_reg_df(dir)

}
metareg_load_reg_df = function(dir = repboxExplore::get_explore_dir())  {
  reg_df = read_explore_rds("mrs_regs.Rds", dir=dir)

  names(reg_df)
  reg_df

}


make_mrs_reg_df = function(dir = repboxExplore::get_explore_dir()) {
  # Note: Part of the data set is generated in repboxExplore
  #       we currently continue from there but should integrate
  #       everything at some point.
  library(repboxExplore)

  reg_df = read_explore_rds("reg_info.Rds", dir=dir)

  # Generate random seeds for each article and step
  # Based on the article random seed also generate
  # a random priority for each step that can be used for sample
  # selection
  reg_df = reg_df %>%
    group_by(artid) %>%
    mutate(art_num_reg = n()) %>%
    mutate(
      art_seed = artid_to_seed(artid),
      art_step_seed = artid_step_to_seed(artid, step)
    ) %>%
    group_by(artid) %>%
    mutate(
      step_prio = with_random_seed(runif(n()),art_seed)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  #max(table(reg_df$art_step_seed))

  # Can't deal with regressions run in Stata's one liner
  # old for loop format.
  # They will be filtered out.
  reg_df = reg_df %>%
    filter(!startsWith(tolower(trimws(cmdline)), "for "))


  # Add relevant scalar variables
  regscalar = read_explore_rds("regscalar.Rds")
  regscalar = regscalar %>% semi_join(reg_df, by=c("artid","step"))
  add_scalars = c("N_clust","F")
  reg_df = join_regscalar(reg_df, regscalar, c("N_clust"))
  reg_df = rename.col(reg_df, "N_clust","nclust")

  regvar = read_explore_rds("regvar.Rds")%>% semi_join(reg_df, by=c("artid","step"))

  regvar_x =  regvar %>% filter(role %in% c("exo","endo"))
  # Find xvars to determine absorbed cluster variables
  xvar = bind_rows(
    (regvar_x[, c("artid","step","cterm")]) %>%
      unique(),
    (regvar_x[, c("artid","step","ia_cterm")]) %>%
      rename.col("ia_cterm","cterm") %>%
      unique()
  ) %>%
    unique() %>%
    mutate(in_x=TRUE)

  clvar = regvar %>%
    filter(role == "cluster") %>%
    select(artid, step, cterm) %>%
    unique() %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    left_join(xvar, by = c("artid", "step", "cterm")) %>%
    mutate(in_x = na.val(in_x,FALSE)) %>%
    rename(cluvar = cterm) %>%
    group_by(artid, step) %>%
    summarize(
      num_cluvar = n(),
      num_absorbed_cluvar = sum(in_x),
      cluvar = paste0(cluvar, collapse=","),
      absorbed_cluvar = paste0(cluvar[in_x], collapse=",")
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  abvar = regvar %>%
    filter(role == "exo", absorbed_fe) %>%
    group_by(artid, step) %>%
    summarize(
      num_absorbed_x = n(),
      absorbed_x = paste0(unique(c(cterm, ia_cterm)), collapse=",")
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  unique(regvar$role)
  weightvar = regvar %>%
    filter(role == "weight") %>%
    group_by(artid, step) %>%
    summarize(
      num_weightvar = n(),
      weightvar = paste0(unique(c(cterm, ia_cterm)), collapse=",")
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  reg_df = reg_df %>%
    left_join(clvar, by = c("artid","step")) %>%
    left_join(abvar, by = c("artid","step")) %>%
    left_join(weightvar, by = c("artid","step")) %>%
    mutate(
      num_cluvar = na.val(num_cluvar, 0),
      num_absorbed_cluvar = na.val(num_absorbed_cluvar, 0),
      cluvar = na.val(num_cluvar, ""),
      absorbed_cluvar = na.val(num_cluvar, ""),

      num_absorbed_x = na.val(num_absorbed_x, 0),
      absorbed_x = na.val(absorbed_x, ""),

      num_weightvar = na.val(num_weightvar, 0),
      weightvar = na.val(weightvar, ""),
      uses_weights = num_weightvar > 0
    )

  # normalize abbreviations of the same regression command
  reg_df = reg_df %>%
    mutate(
      cmd_org = cmd,
      cmd = case_when(
        cmd == "regress" ~ "reg",
        cmd == "ivregress" ~ "ivreg",
        TRUE ~ cmd
      )
    )

  all_cols = names(reg_df)
  cols = unique(c(all_cols[1:21], all_cols[63:73],all_cols))
  reg_df = reg_df[, all_cols]

  save_explore_rds(reg_df, "mrs_regs.Rds")


}


join_regscalar = function(reg, regscalar, var = "N_clust", name = var[1]) {
  df = regscalar[regscalar$scalar_name %in% var,]
  reg = left_join(reg, select(df, artid, step, scalar_val ), by = c("artid","step"))
  reg = rename.col(reg, "scalar_val", name)
  reg
}

```
# END OF FILE: mrs_find_reg.R

-----------------------------------------------------------


# FILE: mrs_parcels.R
```

mrs_load_parcels = function(mrs, parcel_names, parcels=mrs$parcels, if_missing="ignore", add_step_parcels=TRUE) {
  restore.point("mrs_load_parcels")
  if (mrs$use_cache) {
    parcels = mrs_cache_get_parcels(mrs, parcel_names)
  }
  mrs$parcels = c(parcels, mrs$parcels[setdiff(names(mrs$parcels), names(parcels))])
  mrs = mr_load_parcels(mrs, setdiff(parcel_names, names(parcels)), if.missing=if_missing)
  if (mrs$use_cache) {
    mrs_cache_store_parcels(mrs, parcels)
  }
  if (add_step_parcels) mrs = mrs_make_step_parcels(mrs)
  mrs
}

mrs_has_reg_step_parcels = function(mrs, verbose=TRUE) {
  restore.point("mrs_has_reg_step_parcels")
  reg_parcels = c("reg_core","regvar","regxvar","cmdpart","colinfo","colstat")
  missing_parcels = setdiff(reg_parcels, names(mrs$step_parcels))
  if (length(missing_parcels)==0) return(TRUE)
  if (verbose) {
    cat("You have not loaded the step parcels ", paste0(missing_parcels, collapse=", "), " needed for detailed regression analysis.")
  }
  return(FALSE)
}

mrs_missing_reg_parcels = function(mrs, need_parcels = c("reg_core","regvar","regxvar","cmdpart","colinfo","colstat"), stop_if_missing=FALSE) {
  mrs_missing_parcels(mrs, need_parcels, stop_if_missing)
}

mrs_missing_parcels = function(mrs, need_parcels, stop_if_missing=FALSE) {
  missing_parcels = setdiff(need_parcels, names(mrs$step_parcels))
  if (length(missing_parcels)==0) return(NULL)
  if (stop_if_missing) {
    stop(paste0("Missing parcels ", paste0(missing_parcels, collapse=", "), " for ", mrs$project_dir))
  }
  return(missing_parcels)

}

mrs_load_reg_parcels = function(mrs, stop_if_missing=TRUE) {
  restore.point("mrs_load_reg_parcels")
  reg_parcels = c("reg_core","regvar","regxvar","cmdpart","colinfo","colstat","regmap","regmap_coef")
  new_parcels = setdiff(reg_parcels, names(mrs$parcels))
  mrs = mrs_load_parcels(mrs, new_parcels,add_step_parcels = TRUE)
  missing = mrs_missing_reg_parcels(mrs, stop_if_missing=FALSE)
  if (length(missing)>0) {
    msg = paste0("Missing regression parcels ", paste0(missing, collapse=", "), " for project ", mrs$project_dir,".")
    if (stop_if_missing)  {
      stop(msg)
    } else {
      cat("\n",msg,"\n")
    }
  }
  mrs
}

mrs_make_step_parcels = function(mrs,parcel_names = names(mrs$parcels)) {
  restore.point("mrs_make_step_parcels")
  if (is.null(mrs$step_parcels)) {
    mrs$step_parcels = list()
  }
  new_step_parcels = setdiff(parcel_names, names(mrs$step_parcels))
  step_parcels = distill_step_parcels(mrs$parcels[new_step_parcels], step=mrs$step)
  mrs$step_parcels[names(step_parcels)] = step_parcels
  mrs
}

distill_step_parcels = function(parcels, step) {
  restore.point("distill_step_parcels")
  step_parcels = lapply(parcels, function(parcel) {
    lapply(parcel, function(df) {
      if (has.col(df,"step")) {
        df = df[is.true(df$step==step),]
      }
      df
    })
  })
  step_parcels
}
```

```
example = function() {
  library(metaregTools)
  parent_dir = "~/repbox/projects_gha"
  project_dirs = repboxExplore::get_project_dirs(parent_dir)
  metaids = "base"
  metaids = c("base","all")
  from_time = "2024-10-01"
  report_file = "~/repbox/metaregTools/inst/examples/prob_new_report.Rmd"
  metareg_problem_report(project_dirs, metaids, from_time, report_file)



  parent_dir = "~/repbox/projects_gha"
  parent_dir = "~/repbox/projects_gha_old2"
  project_dirs = repboxExplore::get_project_dirs(parent_dir)
  metaids = "base"
  metaids = c("base","all")
  from_time = "2024-10-01"
  report_file = "~/repbox/metaregTools/inst/examples/prob_all_report.Rmd"

  metareg_problem_report(project_dirs, metaids, from_time, report_file)


  parent_dir = "~/repbox/projects_gha_old2"
  project_dirs = repboxExplore::get_project_dirs(parent_dir)
  metaids = "hc"
  prob_df = combine_metareg_problems(project_dirs, metaids, from_time)
  repboxExplore::save_explore_rds(prob_df, "problems_hc.Rds")
}


metareg_problem_report = function(project_dirs, metaid, from_time=NULL, report_file = NULL, rds_file = NULL) {
  restore.point("metareg_problem_report")
  prob_df = combine_metareg_problems(project_dirs, metaid, from_time)
  if (NROW(prob_df)==0) {
    cat("\nNo problems found")
    return()
  }
  prob_df = prob_df %>%
    mutate(
      date = as.Date(prob_df$time),
      err_msg = paste0(type, ": ", msg)
    ) %>%
    group_by(date, err_msg) %>%
    mutate(num_err = n()) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(desc(date), desc(num_err), err_msg)

  if (is.null(from_time)) from_time = min(prob_df$time)

  total_num_art = n_distinct(prob_df$artid)

  agg = prob_df %>%
    group_by(type, msg) %>%
    mutate(
      num_err = n()
    ) %>%
    group_by(type, msg, artid) %>%
    summarize(
      last_date = max(date),
      num_err = first(num_err),
      art_entry = paste0("\n  artid =\"", first(artid), "\"; step = ", paste0(unique(step), collapse=", "),
                         '\n  rstudioapi::filesPaneNavigate("',paste0(first(project_dir), "/metareg/", first(metaid)),'")')
    ) %>%
    group_by(type, msg) %>%
    summarize(
      last_date = max(last_date),
      num_err = first(num_err),
      num_art = n_distinct(artid),
      msg_entry = paste0("\n\n### ",num_err," times in ", num_art, " articles (last on ", last_date,"): ", first(type), " ",first(msg), "\n",paste0(art_entry, collapse="\n"))
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(desc(num_err)) %>%
    summarize(
      date_entry = paste0('## ', n(), " error types across ", total_num_art, " articles\n", paste0(msg_entry, collapse="\n"))
    )

  txt = paste0(
    '# Problems for metareg study ', metaid, " from ", from_time, ' onwards \n\n',
    paste0(agg$date_entry, collapse="\n")
  )
  #cat(txt)
  if (!is.null(report_file)) {
    writeLines(txt, report_file)
  }
  if (!is.null(rds_file)) {
    saveRDS(prob_df, rds_file)
  }
  invisible(txt)
}


metareg_problem_report_by_date = function(project_dirs, metaid, from_time=NULL, report_file = NULL, rds_file = NULL) {
  restore.point("metareg_problem_report")
  prob_df = combine_metareg_problems(project_dirs, metaid, from_time)
  prob_df = prob_df %>%
    mutate(
      date = as.Date(prob_df$time),
      err_msg = paste0(type, ": ", msg)
    ) %>%
    group_by(date, err_msg) %>%
    mutate(num_err = n()) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(desc(date), desc(num_err), err_msg)

  if (is.null(from_time)) from_time = min(prob_df$time)

  agg = prob_df %>%
    group_by(date, type, msg) %>%
    mutate(
      num_err = n()
    ) %>%
    group_by(date, type, msg, artid) %>%
    summarize(
      num_err = first(num_err),
      art_entry = paste0("\n  artid =\"", first(artid), "\"; step = ", paste0(unique(step), collapse=", "),
        '\n  rstudioapi::filesPaneNavigate("',paste0(first(project_dir), "/metareg/", first(metaid)),'")')
    ) %>%
    group_by(date, type, msg) %>%
    summarize(
      num_err = first(num_err),
      msg_entry = paste0("\n\n### ",num_err," times: ", first(type), " ",first(msg), "\n",paste0(art_entry, collapse="\n"))
    ) %>%
    group_by(date) %>%
    arrange(desc(num_err)) %>%
    summarize(
      date_entry = paste0('## ', first(date), ": ", n(), " error types \n\n", paste0(msg_entry, collapse="\n"))
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(date))

  txt = paste0(
    '# Problems for metareg study ', metaid, " from ", from_time, ' onwards \n\n',
    paste0(agg$date_entry, collapse="\n")
  )
  #cat(txt)
  if (!is.null(report_file)) {
    writeLines(txt, report_file)
  }
  if (!is.null(rds_file)) {
    saveRDS(prob_df, rds_file)
  }
  invisible(txt)
}



combine_metareg_problems = function(project_dirs, metaids, from_time=NULL) {
  restore.point("combine_metareg_problems")
  base_metaid = intersect(metaids, "base")
  if ("all" %in% metaids) {
    metaids = setdiff(unique(list.dirs(file.path(project_dirs,"metareg"),full.names=FALSE, recursive=FALSE)),c("dap","base"))
    metaids = union(metaids, "base")
  }

  gr = expand_grid(project_dir = project_dirs, metaid = metaids) %>%
    mutate(prob_dir = case_when(
      metaid == "base" ~ paste0(project_dir, "/problems"),
      TRUE ~ paste0(project_dir, "/metareg/", metaid,"/problems")
    ))

  prob_files = list.files(gr$prob_dir, glob2rx("*.Rds"), full.names = TRUE)
  if (!is.null(from_time)) {
    prob_time = file.mtime(prob_files)
    prob_files = prob_files[prob_time >= from_time]
  }

  prob_df = bind_rows(lapply(prob_files, metareg_read_problem_file))
  prob_df
}

metareg_read_problem_file = function(problem_file, remove_extra=TRUE) {
  prob = readRDS(problem_file)
  if (has.substr(problem_file,"/metareg/")) {
    metaid = str.between(problem_file, "/metareg/","/problems/")
    project_dir = str.left.of(problem_file, "/metareg/problems/")
  } else {
    metaid = "base"
    project_dir = str.left.of(problem_file, "/problems/")
  }

  prob$project_dir = project_dir
  prob$artid = basename(prob$project_dir)
  prob$metaid = metaid
  cols = intersect(unique(c(c("time","metaid","artid","setdiff"), names(prob))),names(prob))
  if (remove_extra) cols = setdiff(cols, "extra")
  prob[cols]
}


metareg_summarize_projects_problems = function(project_dirs,metaid,from_time=NULL, verbose=TRUE) {
  restore.point("metareg_summarize_project_problems")

  meta_dirs = file.path(project_dirs,"metareg", metaid)
  exist = dir.exists(meta_dirs)
  project_dirs = project_dirs[exist]

  for (project_dir in project_dirs) {
    metareg_summarize_project_problems(project_dir, metaid, from_time, verbose)
  }
}

metareg_summarize_project_problems = function(project_dir, metaid, from_time=NULL, verbose=FALSE) {
  restore.point("metareg_summarize_project_problems")
  if (length(project_dir)>1) stop("Only provide a single project_dir")
  meta_dir = file.path(project_dir,"metareg", metaid)
  if (!dir.exists(meta_dir)) return()
  report_file = file.path(meta_dir,"problems.Rmd")
  rds_file = file.path(meta_dir, "problems.Rds")
  metareg_problem_report(project_dir, metaid, from_time, report_file = report_file, rds_file = rds_file)

}

clear_metareg_problems_before = function(project_dirs, metaid, before_time) {
  prob_dirs = paste0(project_dirs, "/metareg/",metaid, "/problems")
  prob_files = list.files(prob_dirs, glob2rx("*.Rds"), full.names = TRUE)
  time = file.mtime(prob_files)
  remove_files = prob_files[time < before_time]
  file.remove(remove_files)
}
```

# FILE: mrs.R
```
mrs_init = function(metaid, project_dir, step=NA, opts=list(), what = NULL, use_cache=TRUE, artid=basename(project_dir), make_meta_dir=TRUE, register_mrs = TRUE) {
  restore.point("mrs_init")
  if (!dir.exists(project_dir)) {
    stop(paste0("project_dir = ", project_dir," does not exist."))
  }
  if (!is.na(step)) {
    if (!isTRUE(is.numeric(step) & length(step)==1)) {
      stop("Argument step must be a single integer and correspond to an existing step in the project.")
    }

  }

  if (is.na(step)) {
    seed = artid_to_seed(artid)
  } else {
    seed = artid_step_to_seed(artid, step)
  }

  mrs = list(
    metaid = metaid,
    project_dir = project_dir,
    meta_dir = file.path(project_dir, "metareg", metaid),
    out_dir = file.path(project_dir, "metareg", metaid, "step_results"),
    artid = artid,
    step = step,
    opts = opts,
    what = what,
    use_cache = use_cache,
    parcels = list(),
    step_parcels = list(),
    seed = seed
  )

  if (register_mrs) {
    prob_opts = getOption("repbox.problem.options")
    if (is.null(prob_opts)) {
      repbox_set_problem_options(project_dir=project_dir, metaid=metaid)
    } else {
      repbox_set_problem_options(project_dir=project_dir, metaid=metaid,fail_action=prob_opts$fail_action)
    }
    repbox_problem_set_step(step)
  }

  if (make_meta_dir & !dir.exists(mrs$meta_dir)) {
    dir.create(mrs$meta_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  mrs
}

#' Write an ouput file for an mrs step
mrs_write_output_rds = function(mrs, base, data, add_step=TRUE, dir=mrs$out_dir) {
  restore.point("mrs_write_output_rds")
  if (is.null(dir)) stop("Specify a directory dir")
  if (!dir.exists(dir)) dir.create(dir,recursive = TRUE)
  if (add_step) {
    out_file = paste0(dir,"/", base,"_", mrs$step,".Rds")
  } else {
    out_file = paste0(dir,"/", base,".Rds")
  }
  saveRDS(data, out_file)
  invisible(out_file)
}
```

# FILE: mrs_reg.R
```
mrs_load_reg_basics = function(mrs,load_data=TRUE, add_fe_cand_info=TRUE) {
  restore.point("mrs_load_reg_basics")
  mrs = mrs_load_reg_parcels(mrs)
  mrs$reg = mrs$step_parcels$reg_core$reg
  # mrs$reg$cmdline
  if (load_data)
    mrs = mrs_load_reg_data(mrs)
  if (add_fe_cand_info)
    mrs = mrs_add_fe_cand_info(mrs)
  mrs
}


#' Adds basic information about the regression to the mrs object.
#'
#' Returns the mrs object with three added fields:
#'  - org_data the data set in its state when the regression is run in Stata
#'  - reg_data transformed version of org_data.
#'    - NA rows are removed
#'    - Columns that are generated by the stata regression formula are explicitly added
#'  - reg an object providing a bit of basic information about the regression
#'
#' TO DO: Add proper caching of data sets that allows faster loading if multiple steps
#'        with the same base data set are loaded.
mrs_load_reg_data = function(mrs, just_org_dat = FALSE) {
  restore.point("mrs_load_reg_basics")
  res = repboxReg::load_reg_data(project_dir = mrs$project_dir, step = mrs$step, just_org_dat = just_org_dat)
  mrs$org_dat = res$org_dat
  # Remove NA rows from dat
  dat = res$dat
  regvar = mrs$step_parcels$regvar$regvar
  cols = intersect(regvar$basevar, names(dat))
  compl = complete.cases(dat[,cols])
  mrs$dat = dat[compl,]

  mrs
}

opts_combine = function(...) {
  args = list(...)
  restore.point("opts_combine")
  opts = args[[1]]
  for (i_1 in seq_len(length(args)-1)) {
    i = i_1+1
    new_opts = args[[i]]
    if (is.null(opts)) {
      opts = new_opts
      next
    }
    new_fields = setdiff(names(new_opts), names(opts))
    opts[new_fields] = new_opts[new_fields]
  }
  opts
}

mrt_look_at_opts = function(
    max_look_at = 10, min_look_at = max_look_at,
    max_order_prio = 1,
    map_prio = 1000,
    fe_cand_prio = -1000,
    fe_cand_size_prio = -100,
    incomplete_fe_cand_prio = max(fe_cand_prio,-990),
    incomplete_fe_cand_size_prio = max(fe_cand_size_prio,-100),
    min_fe_coef_num = 4,
    min_match_score = 0.5,
    prefer_no_fe_cand = TRUE,
    prefer_smaller_fe = TRUE,
    ignore_incomplete_fe = FALSE
) {
  opts = as.list(sys.frame(sys.parent(0)))
  opts
}

# For metastudies that analyse a subset of regression coefficients
# look_at specifies the names of analysed coefficients
#
# This function helps to specify the look_at coefficients
mrs_add_look_at = function(mrs, opts = opts_combine(mrs$look_at_opts,mrs$opts,mrt_look_at_opts())) {
  restore.point("mrs_add_look_at")
  parcels = mrs$step_parcels
  opts = opts_combine(opts, mrt_look_at_opts())

  # prio will be a data frame that specifies a priority for
  # all coefficients in regxvar.
  # If a limited number of coefficents will be studied in a metareg analysis
  # coefficients with higher priority We will prefer coefficients
  # with higher priority for the analysis
  regxvar = parcels$regxvar$regxvar %>%
    filter(in_regcoef)

  regxvar$prio = 0
  xvars = regxvar$cterm
  nvar = NROW(regxvar)
  prio = regxvar[, c("ia_cterm","cterm","prio", "role", "in_regcoef")]

  # Map fe candidate info
  fe_cand = mrs$fe_cand
  fe_cand_x = mrs$fe_cand_regxvar %>%
    arrange(desc(num_in_regcoef)) %>%
    filter(num_in_regcoef >= opts$min_fe_coef_num) %>%
    filter(!duplicated(cterm))

  if (is.null(fe_cand_x)) {
    fe_cand_x = tibble(parent_term=character(0),cterm=character(0), num_in_regcoef=integer(0), from=character(0))
  }
  prio = left_join(prio, fe_cand_x %>% select(cterm, num_fe_vars=num_in_regcoef, fe_from=from ), by = c("cterm")) %>%
    mutate(fe_incomplete = is.true(fe_from == "incomplete_dummy_set"))


  add_prio = function(...) {
    args = list(...)
    for (type in names(args)) {
      val = args[[type]]
      prio[[type]] <<- val
      prio[["prio"]] <<- prio[["prio"]] + val
    }
  }

  add_prio(order_prio = seq(opts$max_order_prio, 0, length = nvar))


  # add fe prios
  names(prio)
  prio = prio %>% mutate(
    fe_cand_prio = case_when(
      is.na(num_fe_vars) ~ 0,
      !is.true(fe_incomplete) ~ num_fe_vars*opts$fe_cand_size_prio + opts$fe_cand_prio,
      is.true(fe_incomplete) ~ num_fe_vars*opts$incomplete_fe_cand_size_prio + opts$incomplete_fe_cand_prio)
  )
  add_prio(fe_cand_prio = prio$fe_cand_prio)

  prio = prio %>% arrange(desc(prio)) %>% select(-ia_cterm)
  prio = prio[!duplicated(prio$cterm),]

  mrs$look_at_prio = prio
  num_pos_prio = sum(prio$prio>0)
  num_look_at = min(num_pos_prio, opts$max_look_at) %>% max(opts$min_look_at) %>% min(NROW(prio))
  mrs$look_at = prio$cterm[seq_len(num_look_at)]
  mrs
}

mrt_specifify_dummy_to_fe = function(mrs, look_at = mrs[["look_at"]], min_fe_coef_num = first_nn(opts$min_fe_coef_num,4), opts = opts_combine(mrs[["fe_opts"]], mrs[["opts"]], mrs[["look_at_opts"]])) {
  restore.point("mrt_specifify_dummy_to_fe")
  if (is.null(mrs$fe_cand)) {
    cat("\nNo fixed effect candidates found.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  fe_cand = mrs$fe_cand %>%
    filter(from != "absorbed", num_in_regcoef >= min_fe_coef_num)
  if (NROW(fe_cand)==0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  fe_look_at = mrs$fe_cand_regxvar %>%
    semi_join(fe_cand, by="parent_term") %>%
    filter(cterm %in% look_at) %>%
    pull(parent_term) %>%
    unique()

  fe = setdiff(fe_cand$parent_term, fe_look_at)


}

mrs_add_fe_cand_info = function(mrs) {
  restore.point("mrs_add_fe_cand_info")
  parcels = mrs$step_parcels
  regvar = parcels$regvar$regvar
  regxvar = parcels$regxvar$regxvar
  colinfo = parcels$colinfo$colinfo

  # dat = mrs$dat
  # is_dummy = sapply(colnames(X)[-1],function(col) is_dummy(X[,col]))
  # dummy_cols = colnames(X)[-1][is_dummy]

  map_regxvar = regxvar %>%
    select(cterm, in_regcoef) %>%
    mutate(in_regxvar=TRUE)

  # 1. Dummy sets from colinfo that are in regxvar
  ic_dummy_set = incomplete_dummy_sets_from_colinfo(colinfo, mrs$org_dat)
  full_dummy_set =   dummy_set_df = colinfo %>%
    filter(dummy_set != "") %>%
    mutate(dummy_set_completeness = 1)

  dummy_set_df = bind_rows(ic_dummy_set, full_dummy_set)


  if (NROW(dummy_set_df)>0) {
    dummy_set_df = dummy_set_df %>%
      left_join(map_regxvar, by = c(var="cterm")) %>%
      mutate(in_regxvar = na.val(in_regxvar, FALSE)) %>%
      group_by(dummy_set) %>%
      mutate(
        num_dummies = n(),
        num_in_regxvar = sum(in_regxvar),
        num_in_regcoef = sum(in_regcoef)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      filter(num_dummies <= num_in_regxvar+1) %>%
      select(parent_term = dummy_set, cterm=var, num_in_regcoef, dummy_set_completeness) %>%
      mutate(from=ifelse(dummy_set_completeness==1, "dummy_set", "incomplete_dummy_set"))
  } else (
    dummy_set_df = NULL
  )



  # 2. Dummy sets generated by regression formula like in
  #    areg y x i.i1#i.i2 i.i2
  regvar_cand = regvar %>%
    filter(role == "exo", !absorbed_fe) %>%
    group_by(ia_cterm) %>%
    filter(all(var_reg_type %in% c("factor","dummy")) & any(var_reg_type == "factor")) %>%
    ungroup()



  formula_cand = regxvar %>%
    semi_join(regvar_cand, by="ia_cterm") %>%
    group_by(ia_cterm) %>%
    mutate(
      num_in_regcoef = sum(in_regcoef)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(parent_term = ia_cterm, cterm, num_in_regcoef) %>%
    mutate(from = rep("formula", n()))

  # In our example
  # areg y x i.i1#i.i2 i.i2
  # the main effect i2 cannot be separately estimated
  # if i1_i2 is added as a fe
  # we should provide a corresponding warning if not all
  # fe are selected
  fe_cand_main_effects_in_other_ia = regvar_cand %>%
    filter(ia_cterm != cterm) %>%
    select(parent_term = cterm, ia_cterm=ia_cterm)





  # TO DO: REMOVE OR MARK MAIN EFFECTS THAT ARE ALREADY PART OF AN INTERACTION


  # 3. Absorbed fixed effects
  absorbed_fe = regvar %>%
    filter(absorbed_fe) %>%
    select(parent_term=ia_cterm) %>%
    mutate(num_in_regcoef=NA_integer_, from ="absorbed")

  if (NROW(formula_cand)==0) formula_cand = NULL


  mrs$fe_cand_regxvar = bind_rows(
    formula_cand,
    dummy_set_df
  )

  if (NROW(dummy_set_df)==0) dummy_set_df = NULL

  cols = c("parent_term", "num_in_regcoef", "from")
  mrs$fe_cand = bind_rows(
    absorbed_fe,
    formula_cand[,cols] %>% unique(),
    dummy_set_df[,cols] %>% unique()
  )
  mrs$fe_cand_main_effects_in_other_ia = fe_cand_main_effects_in_other_ia %>%
    filter(parent_term %in% mrs$fe_cand$parent_term)


  mrs
}

# Provide information about fixed effect candidates
old_mrs_add_fe_cand_info = function(mrs, rs_org, prefix_dummy_set = ".") {
  restore.point("mrs_add_fe_cand_info")
  rs = rs_org
  dat = rs$reg_dat
  parcels = mrs$step_parcels
  regxvar = rs$parcels$regxvar$regxvar
  colinfo = rs$parcels$colinfo$colinfo
  #colstat_dummy = parcels$colstat$colstat_dummy
  xterms = rs$xterms
  regvar = rs$parcels$regvar$regvar

  X = rs$X
  is_dummy = sapply(colnames(X)[-1],function(col) is_dummy(X[,col]))
  dummy_cols = colnames(X)[-1][is_dummy]
  dummy_x = stri_replace_all_fixed(dummy_cols,"`","")


  dummy_df = bind_rows(
    colinfo %>%
      filter(var %in% names(dat), dummy_set != "") %>%
      select(parent_term = dummy_set, cterm=var) %>%
      mutate(from="dummy_set"),
    regxvar %>%
      filter(role=="exo") %>%
      select(parent_term = ia_cterm, cterm=cterm) %>%
      mutate(from="formula")
  ) %>%
    mutate(is_dummy = cterm %in% dummy_x, is_xterm = cterm %in% xterms) %>%
    group_by(parent_term) %>%
    mutate(num_org_levels = n(), num_dummy=sum(is_dummy), num_xterm=sum(is_xterm)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(num_xterm>0 & num_xterm==num_dummy)

  fe_df = dummy_df %>%
    group_by(parent_term, from) %>%
    summarize(in_dummy_df = TRUE, num_dummy = first(num_dummy), num_org_levels=first(num_org_levels)) %>%
    ungroup()

  names(fe_df)
  fe_add = rs$regvar %>%
    filter(absorbed_fe)

  if (NROW(fe_add)>0) {
    fe_add = fe_add %>%
      select(parent_term = cterm,) %>%
      mutate(from="add", in_dummy_df = FALSE, num_dummy = NA_integer_, num_org_levels = NA_integer_)
    for (i in 1:NROW(fe_add)) {
      var = fe_add$parent_term[[i]]
      fe_add$num_org_levels[[i]] = n_distinct(rs$reg_dat[[var]])
    }
    fe_df = bind_rows(fe_df, fe_add)
  }
  fe_df = fe_df %>%
    mutate(
      is_absorbed = !in_dummy_df,
      in_dat = parent_term %in% names(rs$dat)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.true(num_dummy == 1))

  if (prefix_dummy_set != "") {
    rows = which(dummy_df$from=="dummy_set")
    if (length(rows)>0) {
      dummy_df$parent_term[rows] = paste0(prefix_dummy_set,dummy_df$parent_term[rows])
    }
    rows = which(fe_df$from=="dummy_set")
    if (length(rows)>0) {
      fe_df$parent_term[rows] = paste0(prefix_dummy_set,fe_df$parent_term[rows])
    }
  }

  mrs$dummy_info = dummy_df
  mrs$fe_cand_info = fe_df

  mrs$K_incl_fe = NCOL(rs$X) + sum(fe_df$num_org_levels[!fe_df$in_dummy_df]-1)

  mrs
}

# find dummy sets that never add up to more than 1
# this can be dummy sets where the reference level is already omitted
incomplete_dummy_sets_from_colinfo = function(colinfo, dat) {
  restore.point("incomplete_dummy_sets_from_colinfo")
  # 1b semi dummy sets
  df = colinfo %>%
    filter(dummy_set == "", var_group != "", col_type=="dummy")
  if (NROW(df)==0) return(NULL)
  df$dummy_set_completeness = 0

  var_groups = unique(df$var_group)
  group = "sds"
  for (group in var_groups) {
    df_ind = which(df$var_group==group)
    gcols = df$var[df_ind]
    mat = as.matrix(dat[gcols])
    rsum = rowSums(mat)
    if (all(rsum<=1, na.rm=TRUE) & !all(is.na(rsum))) {
      df$dummy_set[df_ind] = group
      df$dummy_set_completeness[df_ind] = mean(rsum)
    }
  }
  df = df[df$dummy_set != "",]
  df
}

```
# END OF FILE: mrs_reg.R

# FILE: mrt_code.R
```
example = function() {
  tpl_file = "~/repbox/metaregTools/R/mrs_example.R"
  tpl = mrt_load_code_tpl(tpl_file)
  code = mrt_tpl_to_code(tpl,list(artid = "myartid", opts=list()))
  cat(code)
}


mrt_make_project_code = function(tpl, args, project_dir = args[["project_dir"]], metaid = args[["metaid"]], step = args[["step"]]) {
  restore.point("mrt_make_project_code")
  if (is.null(project_dir)) stop("No project_dir specified.")
  if (is.null(metaid)) stop("No metaid specified.")
  if (is.null(step)) stop("No step specified.")


  if (isTRUE(is.character(tpl))) {
    tpl = mrt_load_code_tpl(tpl_file)
  }
  if (is.null(tpl)) stop("No tpl defined call mrt_load_code_tpl")

  code = mrt_tpl_to_code(tpl, args)
  code_dir = file.path(project_dir, "metareg", metaid, "code")
  if (!dir.exists(code_dir)) dir.create(code_dir, recursive=TRUE)
  code_file = file.path(code_dir, paste0(metaid, "_", step, ".R"))
  writeLines(code, code_file)
  invisible(code_file)
}

mrt_tpl_to_code = function(tpl, values) {
  restore.point("mrs_tpl_to_code")
  library(sourcemodify)
  somo = somo_init(tpl$head)
  vars = names(values)
  # assignments
  as_df = somo$as_df %>%
    filter(var %in% vars) %>%
    group_by(var) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()

  if (NROW(as_df)==0) {
    return(paste0(tpl$head, "\n", tpl$main))
  }

  vars = as_df$var
  vals = values[vars]
  as_df$new = sapply(vals, code_tpl_value_to_str)
  somo_new = somo_change_assign_rhs(somo,new_df = as_df %>% select(parent=id, new=new))
  mod_df = somo_new$mod_li[[1]]
  new_head = suppressWarnings(somo_make_code(somo_new))
  #cat(new_head)

  return(paste0(new_head, "\n", tpl$main))

}

code_tpl_value_to_str = function(val, quote_string = is.character(val) & length(val)==1) {
  if (is.null(val)) {
    return("NULL")
  }
  if (is.character(val) & length(val)==1) {
    if (quote_string) return(paste0('"', val, '"'))
    return(val)
  }

  return(deparse1(val, collapse=""))
}

mrt_load_code_tpl = function(file, tpl_str = readLines(file)) {
  my_min = function(x) {
    if (length(x)==0) return(NA_integer_)
    min(x)
  }
  head_line = my_min(which(stringi::stri_detect_regex(tpl_str,"^[\\t ]*#[\\t ]*_METAREG_CODE_")))
  if (is.na(head_line)) head_line = 1
  main_line = my_min(which(stringi::stri_detect_regex(tpl_str,"^[\\t ]*#[\\t ]*_FIXED_")))
  end_line = my_min(c(length(tpl_str),which(stringi::stri_detect_regex(tpl_str,"^[\\t ]*#[\\t ]*_END_"))))



  if (is.na(main_line)) {
    tpl = list(
      head = merge.lines(tpl_str[head_line:(end_line)]),
      main = NULL
    )
  } else {
    tpl = list(
      head = merge.lines(tpl_str[head_line:(main_line-1)]),
      main = merge.lines(tpl_str[(main_line):(end_line)])
    )
  }
  tpl
}

#' Source an mrt_code_file
mrt_source_run_code = function(code_file,args=NULL, stop_on_error=first_nn(args$stop_on_error,FALSE), project_dir = args$project_dir, metaid=args$metaid) {
  if (stop_on_error) {
    source(code_file)
  } else {
    res = try(source(code_file))
    if (is(res, "try-error") & !is.null(project_dir)) {
      repbox_problem(type="error", msg=as.character(res),project_dir = project_dir,metaid = metaid, fail_action = "msg")
    }
  }
}
```

```
example = function() {
  project_dir = "~/repbox/projects_test/testsupp"
  do_id = "ivreg_parse"
}

repbox_project_activate_just_do_file = function(project_dir, do_id) {
  do_id = tools::file_path_sans_ext(do_id)
  org_dir = file.path(project_dir, "org")
  do_files = list.files(org_dir, glob2rx("*.do"),full.names = TRUE,recursive = TRUE)
  old_files = list.files(org_dir, glob2rx("*.old"),full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
  do_ids = str.left.of(basename(do_files), ".")
  old_ids = str.left.of(basename(old_files), ".")

  make_old = do_files[!do_ids %in% do_id]
  for (f in make_old) {
    of = paste0(f,".old")
    file.rename(f, of)
  }
  do_id = setdiff(do_id, do_ids)
  make_do = old_files[old_ids %in% do_id]
  for (fo in make_do) {
    f = str.left.of(fo, ".old")
    file.rename(fo, f)
  }


}
```

# FILE: reg_spec.R
```
#' Generate Detailed Regression Specification
#'
#' Creates a regression specification by configuring dummy sets, fixed effects, and
#' preferred R commands. Supports transformations between dummy sets and fixed effects,
#' and currently supports regression commands \code{"lm"} and \code{"fixest"}.
#'
#' @param mrs A metareg \code{mrs} object generated with \code{init_mrs}.
#' @param sort_by_cluster Logical. If \code{TRUE}, sorts the dataset by the cluster variable (if present). Default is \code{FALSE}.
#' @param prefer_cmd The preferred R command to use for building regression formulas. Default is \code{"lm"}.
#' @param dummy_to_fe A vector of dummy variables to convert to fixed effects. Default is \code{NULL}.
#' @param fe_to_dummy A vector of fixed effects to convert to dummy variables. Default is \code{NULL}.
#' @param prefix_dummy_factor A string prefix for dummy set variable names. Default is \code{"."}.
#'
#' @return A regression specification object containing various components such as:
#' \item{reg}{The core regression object from parcels.}
#' \item{formula}{The full regression formula.}
#' \item{lm_formula}{The linear model formula excluding fixed effects.}
#' \item{depvar}{The dependent variable name.}
#' \item{xterms}{The explanatory variables in the regression.}
#' \item{fevar}{The fixed effect variables.}
#' \item{X}{The model matrix for the regression.}
#' \item{reg_dat}{The prepared dataset for regression analysis.}
#'
#' @export

mrt_reg_spec = function(mrs, sort_by_cluster=FALSE,rcmd = NULL, dummy_to_fe = NULL, fe_to_dummy = NULL, prefix_dummy_factor = ".",drop_xterms = NULL, drop_na_coef=FALSE, verbose=FALSE) {
  restore.point("mrt_reg_spec")

  if (!mrs_has_reg_step_parcels(mrs)) stop("Please first call\nmrs=mrs_load_reg_parcels(mrs)")
  if (is.null(mrs[["dat"]])) stop("Please first call\nmrs=mrs_load_reg_basics(mrs)")

  step = mrs$step
  parcels = mrs$step_parcels
  dat = mrs[["dat"]]
  reg = parcels$reg_core$reg
  if (NROW(dat)==0) stop("Missing regression data.")

  library(regtranslate)
  if (!is.null(c(dummy_to_fe, fe_to_dummy))) {
    res = rst_transform_fe_dummy(mrs, fe_to_dummy,dummy_to_fe, dat, parcels, prefix_dummy_factor=prefix_dummy_factor)
    dat = res$dat
    parcels = res$parcels
  }

  if (is.null(rcmd)) {
    if (length(dummy_to_fe)>0) rcmd = "fixest" else rcmd = "lm"

  }

  mrs$reg$cmdline
  regvar = parcels$regvar$regvar
  regxvar = parcels$regxvar$regxvar
  cmdpart = parcels$cmdpart$cmdpart

  # We may want to drop x_terms
  if (length(drop_xterms)>0) {
    regvar = regvar %>%
      filter(! (cterm %in% drop_xterms & role %in% c("exo","endo")) )
    regxvar = regxvar %>%
      filter(!cterm %in% drop_xterms)
  }

  code_df = regtranslate::reg_stata_to_r_code(reg,regvar=regvar, regxvar=regxvar, cmdpart=cmdpart, prefer=rcmd)

  formula_code = code_df$code[code_df$part=="formula"]
  formula_str = str.right.of(formula_code, "=") %>% trimws()
  formula = parse_eval(formula_code)

  # lm part of formula
  # if we have fixed effects with feols formula like
  # y~x1 + x2 | fe1+fe2 | 0 | cu1
  # we will only get
  # y~x1 + x2
  lm_formula_str = str.left.of(formula_str, "|")
  lm_formula = as.formula(lm_formula_str)

  rhs = str.right.of(lm_formula_str, "~") %>% stri_replace_all_fixed("`","")
  xterms = strsplit(rhs, "+",fixed = TRUE)[[1]] %>%
    trimws() %>%
    setdiff(c("0", "1"))

  depvar = regvar$basevar[regvar$role=="dep"]
  rcmd = parse_eval(code_df$code[code_df$part=="rcmd"])
  cluvar = regvar$basevar[regvar$role=="cluster"]
  weightvar = regvar$basevar[regvar$role=="weight"]
  fevar = regvar$basevar[regvar$role=="exo" & regvar$absorbed_fe]

  sort_by_cluster = sort_by_cluster & length(cluvar)==1

  if (sort_by_cluster) {
    dat = dat[order(dat[[cluvar]]),]
  }

  dat = as.data.frame(dat)

  all_var = unique(c(depvar, xterms, fevar, weightvar, cluvar))
  missing_var = setdiff(all_var, names(dat))

  # Add missing dummy columns in data set
  missing_dummies = missing_var[has.substr(missing_var,"=")]
  if (length(missing_dummies)>0) {
    dat = create_cterm_cols(dat, missing_dummies)
  }
  missing_var = setdiff(all_var, names(dat))


  if (length(missing_var)>0) {
    stop(paste0(length(missing_var), " of ", length(all_var), " regression variables are missing from data set: ", paste0(missing_var, collapse=", ")))
  }

  # Only rows without any NA in the regression variables will be used
  used_rows = which(complete.cases(dat[,all_var]))
  reg_dat = dat[used_rows, ,drop=FALSE]
  #rownames(dat) = seq_len(NROW(dat))

  # Compute cluster sizes based on reg_dat
  if (sort_by_cluster) {
    clu_rle = rle(as.vector(reg_dat[[cluvar]]))
    clu_extras = list(
      clu_val = clu_rle$values,
      clu_size = clu_rle$lengths,
      nclu = length(clu_rle$lengths)
    )
  } else {
    clu_extras = NULL
  }


  # only for non fe part
  model_frame = model.frame(lm_formula, reg_dat)
  X = model.matrix(lm_formula, model_frame)
  colnames(X) = stri_replace_all_fixed(colnames(X),"`","")
  rs = c(
    list(
      reg = reg,
      step = step,
      project_dir = mrs$project_dir,
      regvar=regvar,
      regxvar=regxvar,
      cmdpart=cmdpart,
      rcmd = rcmd,
      formula_str = formula_str,
      formula = formula,
      lm_formula = lm_formula,
      lm_formula_str = lm_formula_str,
      depvar = depvar,
      xterms = xterms,
      fevar = fevar,
      cluvar=cluvar,
      weightvar = weightvar,
      y = model_frame[[depvar]],
      X = X,
      model_frame = model_frame,
      used_rows = used_rows,
      dat = dat,
      reg_dat = reg_dat,
      code_df = code_df,
      parcels = parcels,
      # store call arguments
      sort_by_cluster=sort_by_cluster,
      dummy_to_fe = dummy_to_fe,
      fe_to_dummy = fe_to_dummy,
      prefix_dummy_factor = prefix_dummy_factor,
      drop_xterms = drop_xterms
    ),
    clu_extras,
    as.list(reg)
  )

  if (drop_na_coef) {
    rs = rs_drop_na_coef(mrs=mrs, rs=rs, verbose=verbose)
  }

  rs
}

# When running the regression: some coefficients might be dropped as NA
rs_drop_na_coef = function(mrs, rs, rcmd = rs$rcmd, verbose=TRUE) {
  restore.point("rs_drop_na_coefs")
  reg_res = rs[["reg_res"]]
  if (is.null(reg_res)) {
    reg_res = rst_run_reg(rs, rcmd)
  }
  coefs = coef_without_backtick(reg_res)
  na_coefs = intersect(names(coefs)[is.na(coefs)], rs$xterms)
  if (length(na_coefs)==0) {
    rs$reg_res = reg_res
    return(rs)
  }
  if (verbose) {
    cat(paste0("\nDropped ", length(na_coefs), " collinear explanatory variables: ", paste0(na_coefs, collapse=", "),"\n"))
  }
  new_rs = mrt_reg_spec(mrs,sort_by_cluster = rs$sort_by_cluster, rcmd = rs$rcmd, dummy_to_fe = rs$dummy_to_fe, fe_to_dummy = rs$fe_to_dummy, prefix_dummy_factor = rs$prefix_dummy_factor,drop_xterms = na_coefs,drop_na_coef = FALSE)
  return(new_rs)
}

#' Add Demeaned Variables and Run Linear Model
#'
#' Computes demeaned versions of the explanatory and dependent variables if fixed effects are present.
#' Updates the regression specification object with these demeaned variables and fits a linear model.
#'
#' @param rs A reg spec object containing the regression data, formula, and variable information.
#'
#' @return The updated reg spec object with the following fields:
#' \item{reg_dat_dm}{The dataset with demeaned variables.}
#' \item{X_dm}{The demeaned explanatory variable matrix.}
#' \item{y_dm}{The demeaned dependent variable.}
#' \item{reg_dm}{The linear model fit using the demeaned data.}
#'
#' @export
rs_add_lm_demeaned = function(rs) {
  restore.point("reg_spec_add_lm_demeaned")
  if (length(rs$fevar)>0) {
    X_d = fixest::demean(rs$X[,-1], rs$reg_dat[rs$fevar])
    y_d = fixest::demean(rs$y, rs$reg_dat[rs$fevar])
    reg_dat_dm = rs$reg_dat
    reg_dat_dm[,colnames(X_d)] = X_d
    reg_dat_dm[[rs$depvar]] = y_d
    X_d = cbind(1, X_d)
  } else {
    X_d = rs$X
    y_d = rs$y
    reg_dat_dm = rs$reg_dat
  }
  rs$reg_dat_dm = reg_dat_dm
  rs$X_dm = X_d
  rs$y_dm = y_d
  # Don't use formula directly since
  # formula has an environment in which
  # the data set is searched...
  form = as.formula(rs$lm_formula_str)
  reg_dm = lm(form, data=reg_dat_dm)
  rs$reg_dm = reg_dm
  rs
}

# Check if a regression specification has fixed effects
rst_has_fe = function(rs) {
  length(rs$fevar>0)
}

# Generate a least square dummy variable regression specification
# that does not absorb any fixed effects
mrt_reg_spec_lsdv = function(mrs, sort_by_cluster=FALSE,rcmd = NULL,drop_na_coef=FALSE,...) {
  parcels = mrs$step_parcels
  regvar = parcels$regvar$regvar
  fe_to_dummy = unique(regvar$ia_cterm[regvar$absorbed_fe])
  mrt_reg_spec(mrs,sort_by_cluster=sort_by_cluster, rcmd = rcmd, fe_to_dummy = fe_to_dummy,drop_na_coef=drop_na_coef, ...)
}

```

# FILE: regtools.R
```
cut_numeric_cols = function(dat, cols=names(dat), quantile_by = 0.1) {
  restore.point("cut_numeric_cols")
  is_num = sapply(dat[cols], is.numeric)
  cols = cols[is_num]
  num_levels = sapply(dat[cols], n_distinct)

  i = 5
  q_levels = seq(0,1, by=quantile_by)

  for (i in seq_along(cols)) {
    col = cols[i]
    v = dat[[i]]
    if (num_levels[i]<=num_quantiles) {
      vals = sort(unique(v))
      dat[[col]] = as.character(match(v, vals))
    } else {
      q = quantile(v,q_levels)
      dat[[col]] = as.character(cut(v,c(-Inf,unique(q),Inf)))
    }
  }
  dat
}
```

```
repbox_test = function(ok, msg, type="repbox_test") {
  if (isTRUE(ok)) return(TRUE)
  repbox_problem(msg,type=type, fail_action="error")
  return(FALSE)
}

repbox_test_file_exists = function(file, msg=paste0("Expected file ", file, " does not exist.")) {
  repbox_test(isTRUE(file.exists(file)), msg)
}
```

# FILE: rs_tools.R
```
#' Internal function: Transform Fixed Effects into Dummy Variables or Vice Versa
#'
#' Converts specified fixed effects into dummy variables
#' or vice versa and updates the dataset and
#' parcel information accordingly for a regspec object.
#'
#' @param fe_to_dummy A vector of fixed effect variables to be transformed into dummy variables. Default is \code{NULL}.
#' @param dummy_to_fe A vector of dummy variables to be converted back to fixed effects. Default is \code{NULL}.
#' @param dat The dataset to be transformed.
#' @param parcels A list containing parcel information, such as \code{regvar} and \code{regxvar}.
#' @param prefix_dummy_factor A string prefix added to dummy variable names. Default is \code{"."}.
#'
#' @return A list containing:
#' \item{dat}{The transformed dataset with added or modified variables.}
#' \item{parcels}{The updated parcels list.}

rst_transform_fe_dummy = function(mrs, fe_to_dummy = NULL, dummy_to_fe = NULL, dat, parcels, prefix_dummy_factor = ".") {
  restore.point("rst_transform_fe_dummy")


  regvar = parcels$regvar$regvar
  regxvar = parcels$regxvar$regxvar



  if (!is.null(dummy_to_fe)) {
    dummy_to_fe = rst_add_main_fe_dummy_to_fe(mrs, dummy_to_fe, verbose=TRUE)
    var = dummy_to_fe[[1]]

    for (var in dummy_to_fe) {
      fe_info = mrs$fe_cand[mrs$fe_cand$parent_term == var,]

      # Don't need to do anything for absorbed fixed effects
      if (fe_info$from=="absorbed") next

      # A formula like i.f1#i.f2 or just i.f1
      if (fe_info$from == "formula") {
        if (!var %in% names(dat)) {
          dat = repboxReg::create_cterm_col(dat, var)
        }
        # Adapt regvar
        rows = which(regvar$role=="exo" & regvar$ia_cterm==var)
        if (length(rows)>1) {
          regvar = regvar[-rows[-1],]
        }
        row = rows[1]

        regvar$absorbed_fe[row] = TRUE
        regvar$var_reg_type[row] = regvar$var_org_type[row] = regvar$ia_reg_type[row] = "factor"
        regvar$cterm[row] = regvar$basevar[row] = regvar$var_source_expr[row] = var

        # Remove from regxvar
        regxvar = regxvar %>% filter(ia_cterm != var)

      # dummy sets
      } else {
        colinfo = parcels$colinfo$colinfo
        dummy_cols = colinfo$var[colinfo$var_group == var]
        new_var = paste0(prefix_dummy_factor, var)
        dat[[new_var]] = dummy_set_to_factor(dat, dummy_cols,use_ind = TRUE)

        # remove from regxvar
        regxvar = regxvar %>% filter(!ia_cterm %in% dummy_cols)

        # adapt regvar
        rows = which(regvar$role=="exo" & regvar$ia_cterm %in% dummy_cols)
        if (length(rows)>1) {
          regvar = regvar[-rows[-1],]
        }
        row = rows[1]
        regvar$absorbed_fe[row] = TRUE
        regvar$var_reg_type[row] = "factor"
        regvar$ia_reg_type[row] = "factor"
        regvar$cterm[row]=regvar$basevar[row]=regvar$ia_cterm[row] =  regvar$ia_source_expr[row] = regvar$var_source_expr[row] = new_var
      }
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(fe_to_dummy)) {
    fe_to_dummy
    var = fe_to_dummy[[1]]
    if (NROW(regxvar) > 0) {
      step = regxvar$step[1]
      artid = regxvar$artid[1]
    } else {
      step = NA_integer_
      artid = ""
    }
    for (var in fe_to_dummy) {
      row = which(regvar$ia_cterm==var & regvar$role=="exo")
      regvar$absorbed_fe[row] = FALSE
      du_df = as.data.frame(make_dummies(dat[[var]], prefix = paste0(var,"=")))
      regxvar = bind_rows(regxvar, tibble(artid=artid, step=step,ia_cterm=var, cterm=colnames(du_df), role="exo", in_regcoef=TRUE))
      dat = bind_cols(dat, du_df)
    }
  }
  parcels$regvar$regvar = regvar
  parcels$regxvar$regxvar = regxvar
  list(dat=dat, parcels=parcels)
}

rst_add_main_fe_dummy_to_fe = function(mrs, dummy_to_fe, verbose=FALSE) {
  main_check = mrs$fe_cand_main_effects_in_other_ia %>%
    filter(ia_cterm %in% dummy_to_fe)
  extra = setdiff(main_check$parent_term, dummy_to_fe)
  if (length(extra)>0) {
    cat("\nAdded ", paste0(extra, collapse=", "), " to absorbed fixed effects, since they are part of absorbed interaction terms and their coefficients cannot be computed.\n")
    dummy_to_fe = union(dummy_to_fe, extra)
  }
  dummy_to_fe
}


#' Run Regression Based on Specification
#'
#' Executes a regression based on the provided regression specification and command.
#'
#' @param rs A reg spec object.
#' @param rcmd The regression command to run. Defaults to \code{rs$rcmd}.
#' Supported values are \code{"lm"} for linear regression and \code{"feols"} for fixed effects regression.
#'
#' @return A regression model object produced by the specified command.
#'
#' @export

rst_run_reg = function(rs, rcmd=rs$rcmd) {
  if (rcmd=="lm") {
    reg_res = lm(rs$formula, data=rs$reg_dat)
  } else if (rcmd=="feols") {
    reg_res = fixest::feols(rs$formula, rs$reg_dat)
  } else {
    stop(paste0("Unknown R regression command ", rcmd))
  }
  reg_res
}

#' Find Perfect Predictor Variables
#'
#' Identifies variables in the dataset that act as perfect predictors by
#' checking if they take only two distinct values and one of these values
#' occurs in a single observation.
#' There can be other cases that makes x a perfect
#'  predictor but those are not considered here
#'
#' @param rs A reg spec object.
#' @param dat The dataset to search for perfect predictors. Defaults to \code{rs$reg_dat}.
#' @param xterms The explanatory variables to check. Defaults to \code{rs$xterms}.
#' @param fevar The fixed effect variables to check. Defaults to \code{rs$fevar}.
#'
#' @return A list containing:
#' \item{pp}{A vector of all perfect predictor variables found.}
#' \item{fe_pp}{Perfect predictor variables within \code{fevar}.}
#' \item{x_pp}{Perfect predictor variables within \code{xterms}.}
#'
#' @export
rst_find_perfect_predictor_x = function(rs, dat=rs$reg_dat, xterms = rs$xterms, fevar = rs$fevar) {
  restore.point("rst_find_perfect_predictor_x")

  x_is_perfect_pred = function(val) {
    if (n_distinct(val)!=2) return(FALSE)
    tab = table(val)
    min(tab)==1
  }

  fevar_is_perfect_pred = function(val) {
    tab = table(val)
    min(tab)==1
  }

  x_pp = fe_pp = NULL

  if (length(xterms)>0)
    x_pp = xterms[sapply(dat[xterms],x_is_perfect_pred)]
  if (length(fevar)>0)
    fe_pp = fevar[sapply(dat[fevar],fevar_is_perfect_pred)]

  list(pp = union(x_pp, fe_pp), fe_pp=fe_pp, x_pp=x_pp)
}




#' Convert Dummy Sets to Factor Variables
#'


#' Deconstruct Complex Term Dummies and Interaction Terms
#'
#' Extracts and simplifies complex terms in a model frame by breaking down
#' interaction terms and dummy variable expressions into their components.
#' It adds necessary factor and numeric columns to the model frame.
#'
#' @param mf The model frame containing terms used in the regression.
#' @param reg_dat The original regression dataset.
#'
#' @return The updated model frame with decomposed interaction terms and dummy variables.
#'
#' @export
rst_deconstruct_model_frame_cterm_dummies_and_ia = function(mf, reg_dat) {
  restore.point("reg_spec_deconstruct_cterm_dummies_and_ia")

  all_cols = names(mf)
  # Interaction terms
  ia_cols = all_cols[has.substr(all_cols,"#")]
  ia_parts = unique(unlist(strsplit(ia_cols, "#", fixed=TRUE)))

  cols = union(setdiff(all_cols, ia_cols), ia_parts)

  eq_cols = cols[has.substr(cols, "=")]
  eq_bases =  unique(repboxReg::cterm_extract_base(eq_cols))

  add_factor_cols = eq_bases
  for (col in add_factor_cols) {
    if (col %in% names(mf)) {
      if (is.numeric(mf[[col]])) {
        mf[[paste0("f.",col)]] = as.character(mf[[col]])
      }
    } else {
      mf[[paste0("f.",col)]] = as.character(reg_dat[[col]])
    }
  }

  add_num_cols = setdiff(ia_parts, eq_cols)
  for (col in add_num_cols) {
    if (!col %in% names(mf)) {
      mf[[col]] = reg_dat[[col]]
    }
  }
  rem_cols = union(ia_cols, eq_cols)
  mf = mf[,setdiff(names(mf), rem_cols)]
  mf
}


example_ia_and_fe = function() {
  set.seed(1233)
  n = 100
  dat = tibble(
    y = rnorm(n),
    f1 = sample(c("a","b","c"), n, replace=TRUE),
    f2=sample(c("x","y,","z") , n, replace=TRUE),
    f3=sample(c("m","n") , n, replace=TRUE),
    x = rnorm(n) +0.5*(f1=="a") + 0.2*(f2=="x") + (0.2* (f1=="b" & f2=="z")),
    f1_f2 = paste0(f1,"_",f2),
    f1_f2_f3 = paste0(f1,"_",f2,"_",f3)
  )
  # no main effects
  lm(y~x+f1:f2,data=dat)
  lm(y~x+f1_f2,data=dat)
  library(fixest)
  feols(y~x|f1_f2, data=dat)

  # with main effects
  lm(y~x+f1*f2,data=dat)
  lm(y~x+f1_f2+f1+f2,data=dat)
  library(fixest)
  feols(y~x|f1_f2, data=dat)
  feols(y~x|f1_f2+f1+f2, data=dat)

  # Tripple effects
  lm(y~x+f1*f2*f3,data=dat)
  lm(y~x+f1:f2:f3,data=dat)
  lm(y~x+f1:f2:f3+f1:f2,data=dat)
  lm(y~x+f1:f2:f3+f1:f2+f1,data=dat)

  feols(y~x|f1_f2_f3, data=dat)
  feols(y~x|f1_f2_f3+f1, data=dat)

}
```

# FILE: tools.R
```
str_remove_backticks = function(str) {
  stri_replace_all_fixed(str, "`","")
}

coef_without_backtick = function(obj) {
  if (isTRUE(is.character(obj))) {
    return(str_remove_backticks(obj))
  } else if (isTRUE(is.numeric(obj))) {
    coef = obj
  } else {
    coef = coef(obj)
  }
  names(coef) = str_remove_backticks(names(coef))
  return(coef)
}



# First non null
first_nn = function (...) {
  args = list(...)
  for (val in args) {
    if (!is.null(val))
      return(val)
  }
  return(NULL)
}
# sep.lines = function(str) {
#   unlist(stri_split_fixed(str, "\n"))
# }
# merge.lines = function (txt, collapse = "\n") {
#   paste0(txt, collapse = collapse)
# }

my_glue <- function(template, values = list(), .envir = parent.frame(), quote_string=FALSE) {
  library(stringi)
  # Define the regex pattern to capture text inside curly braces.
  if (quote_string) {
    placeholder_pattern <- '"\\{([^}]+)\\}"'
  } else {
    placeholder_pattern <- '\\{([^}]+)\\}'
  }


  # Find all matches; the second column contains the captured variable names.
  matches <- stri_match_all_regex(template, placeholder_pattern)[[1]]

  # If there are any placeholders, process them.
  if (!is.null(matches) && nrow(matches) > 0) {
    # Get the unique placeholder names.
    placeholders <- unique(matches[, 2])

    # Loop over each placeholder name.
    for (ph in placeholders) {
      # Look for the placeholder value in the provided list.
      if (!is.null(values[[ph]])) {
        replacement <- values[[ph]]
      } # Otherwise, try to find it in the calling environment.
      else if (exists(ph, envir = .envir)) {
        replacement <- get(ph, envir = .envir)
      } else {
        replacement = NULL
        #stop(sprintf("No value found for placeholder '%s'", ph))
      }

      # Convert the replacement to a string (if it isn’t already).

      replacement <- inner_glue_get_value(replacement, quote_string)


      # Build a regex pattern to match the current placeholder.
      if (quote_string) {
        regex <- sprintf('"\\{%s\\}"', ph)
      } else {
        regex <- sprintf("\\{%s\\}", ph)
      }

      # Replace all occurrences of this placeholder in the template.
      template <- stri_replace_all_regex(template, regex, replacement, vectorize_all = FALSE)
    }
  }

  return(template)
}
```

# FILE: up_to_date.R

```
examples = function() {
  # Better add when creating run script

  # update_before = "2023-02-12 07:56"
  update_before = NULL
  what = mrt_remove_up_to_date_what(metaid, project_dir, step, update_before,what, mrs_hc_what_file_ids())
  if (length(what)==0) {
    cat("\nEverything up-to-date in ", project_dir); return(TRUE)
  }
}

mrt_remove_up_to_date_what = function(metaid, project_dir, step, update_before=NULL, what, what_file_ids) {
  restore.point("mrt_remove_up_to_date_what")
  out_dir = file.path(project_dir, "metareg", metaid, "step_results")
  what_files = paste0(out_dir, "/", what_file_ids,"_", mrs$step, ".Rds")
  mtime = file.mtime(what_files)
  all_what = names(what_file_ids)
  up_to_date = is.true(mtime >= update_before)
  setdiff(what, all_what[up_to_date])
}

mrt_output_rds_time_stamps = function(mrs, what_file_ids) {
  restore.point("mrt_output_rds_time_stamps")
  what_files = paste0(mrs$out_dir, "/", what_file_ids,"_", mrs$step, ".Rds")
  file.mtime(what_files)
}
```

```
# Functions related to data cache handling



example = function() {
  project = "testsupp"
  project_dir = file.path("~/repbox/projects_reg",project)

  mr_get_project_cache_files(project_dir)
}

dap_and_cache_check_outdated = function(project_dir, sup.dir = file.path(project_dir,"org")) {
  restore.point("dap_and_cache_check_outdated")
  do.files = list.files(sup.dir, glob2rx("*.do"), full.names = TRUE,recursive = TRUE)

  cache.dir = paste0(project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/cache")
  extra.cache.dir = paste0(project_dir, "/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache")

  cache.files = list.files(c(cache.dir, extra.cache.dir),glob2rx("*.dta"), full.names = TRUE)

  dap.file = file.path(project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/dap.Rds")

  dap.time = file.mtime(dap.file)
  do.max.time = suppressWarnings(max(file.mtime(do.files)))
  cache.min.time = suppressWarnings(min(file.mtime(cache.files)))

  if (isTRUE(do.max.time > dap.time)) {
    # Only show warning since sometimes file stamps
    # seem to act weird...
    warning("In your org folder a do seem file newer than the DAP. Probably, you should re-run the initial reproduction before performing regression analysis.")
    return(list(ok=TRUE, msg="In your org folder, a do file seems to be newer than the DAP. Probably, you should re-run the initial reproduction before performing regression analysis."))
  }

  if (isTRUE(do.max.time > dap.time)) {
    return(list(ok=FALSE, msg="There is a do file newer than the DAP. Please clear DAP and cache and run all new: 1. repox without reg (to create run.df), 2. repbox with reg (to create DAP and caches) 3. Your metastudy"))
  }
  if (isTRUE(cache.min.time < dap.time)) {
    return(list(ok=FALSE, msg="There is a cache file older than the DAP. Please clear DAP and cache and run new: 1. repbox with reg and 2. metastudy"))
  }

  return(list(ok=TRUE))
}

dap_and_cache_remove_from_project = function(project_dir) {
  restore.point("dap_and_cache_remove_from_project")
  dap.file = file.path(project_dir,"metareg/dap/stata/dap.Rds")
  extra.cache.dir = paste0(project_dir, "/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache")
  cache.dir = paste0(project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/cache")

  if (file.exists(dap.file)) {
    file.remove(dap.file)
  }
  cache.files = list.files(cache.dir,full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(cache.files)>0) file.remove(cache.files)
  cache.files = list.files(extra.cache.dir,full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(cache.files)>0) file.remove(cache.files)
}

dap_and_cache_remove_from_project = function(project_dir) {
  restore.point("dap_and_cache_remove_from_project")
  dap.file = file.path(project_dir,"metareg/dap/stata/dap.Rds")
  extra.cache.dir = paste0(project_dir, "/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache")
  cache.dir = paste0(project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/cache")

  if (file.exists(dap.file)) {
    file.remove(dap.file)
  }
  cache.files = list.files(cache.dir,full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(cache.files)>0) file.remove(cache.files)
  cache.files = list.files(extra.cache.dir,full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(cache.files)>0) file.remove(cache.files)

}


# Will be called at the beginning of mr_run
dap_check_all_cache_files_exist = function(project_dir, step.df) {
  restore.point("dap_check_all_cache_files_exist")
  if (NROW(step.df)==0) return(list(ok=TRUE))
  cache.rows = which(step.df$cache)
  cache_df = mr_get_cache_df(project_dir)
  ok = all(step.df$step[cache.rows] %in% cache_df$step)
  if (ok) {
    return(list(ok=TRUE))
  }

  list(ok=FALSE, has.any.cache.files=NROW(cache_df)>0)
}



# TO DO: Improve cache interface in repboxReg
mr_get_cache_df = function(project_dir) {
  extra.cache.dir = file.path(project_dir, "/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache")
  extra.cache.files = list.files(extra.cache.dir,glob2rx("step_*.dta"), full.names = TRUE)


  cache.dir = paste0(project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/cache")
  cache.files = list.files(cache.dir, "*.dta",full.names = TRUE)

  df = bind_rows(
    tibble(extra_cache=rep(TRUE, length(extra.cache.files)),file = extra.cache.files),
    tibble(extra_cache=rep(FALSE, length(cache.files)), file = cache.files)
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      base = basename(file),
      step = str.between(base,"step_",".dta") %>% as_integer()
    ) %>%
    select(step, everything())

  df
}


mr_get_cache_file = function(project_dir=project_dir, step, check.exists=FALSE) {
  restore.point("mr_get_cache_file")
  project_dir = standardizePath(project_dir)

  extra.cache.file = paste0(project_dir, "/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache/step_", step,".dta")
  if (file.exists(extra.cache.file)) {
    return(extra.cache.file)
  }

  cache.file = paste0(project_dir, "/metareg/dap/stata/cache/step_", step,".dta")
  if (file.exists(cache.file)) {
    return(cache.file)
  }
  stop(paste0("No data cache file exists for ", project_dir, " step ", step))
}




# Make extra cache assuming the Stata path code works
# but the R code does not run (e.g.  due to )

mr_make_extra_cache = function(mr, step) {
  restore.point("make_extra_cache")
  code.file = write_extra_cache_code(mr, step)
  run_stata_do(code.file)

  cache.dir = paste0(mr$project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache")
  cache.file = file.path(cache.dir, paste0("step_", step, ".dta"))
  if (file.exists(cache.file)) {
    return(cache.file)
  }
  return(NULL)
}

mr_load_extra_cache = function(mr, step, cache.file = NULL) {
  if (is.null(cache.file)) {
    cache.file = paste0(mr$project_dir,"/metareg/extra_cache/step_", step, ".dta")
    if (!file.exists(cache.file)) {
      cache.file = paste0(mr$project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache/step_", step, ".dta")
    }
  }

  if (file.exists(cache.file)) {
    return(haven::read_dta(cache.file))
  }
  return(NULL)
}

write_extra_cache_code = function(mr, step, code.file=paste0(mr$project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache/step_",step,".do"), ...) {
  restore.point("mr_write_path_stata_code")

  dap = mr
  txt = ""
  astep = first(dap$path.df$astep[dap$path.df$step == step])

  path = dap$path.df[dap$path.df$astep == astep & dap$path.df$step <= step,]

  # 1. Get data file
  file = mr_get_cache_file(mr$project_dir, path$step[1])
  txt = paste0(txt,'\nuse "', file,'", clear\n')

  # 2. code for all data modification steps
  steps = path$step
  txt = paste0(txt,"\n", paste0(mr$step.df$stata_code[steps], collapse = "\n"))

  # 3. store extra cache
  cache.dir = paste0(mr$project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache")
  if (!dir.exists(cache.dir)) {
    dir.create(cache.dir,recursive = TRUE)
  }
  cache.file = file.path(cache.dir, paste0("step_", step, ".dta"))
  txt = paste0(txt,'\nsave "', cache.file,'", replace\n')

  writeLines(txt, code.file)
  invisible(code.file)
}

mr_get_extra_infeasible_steps = function(project_dir=NULL, inf.dir = paste0(mr$project_dir,"/metareg/extra_infeasible")) {
  restore.point("mr_get_extra_infeasible_steps")
  if (!dir.exists(inf.dir)) return(NULL)
  files = c(
    list.files(inf.dir, glob2rx("*.inf"),full.names = TRUE)
  )
  base = basename(files)
  steps = str.between(base,"step_",".")
  as_integer(steps)
}



mr_get_extra_cache_files = function(project_dir=NULL, cache.dir = paste0(project_dir,"/metareg/dap/stata/extra_cache")) {
  restore.point("mr_get_extra_cache_files")
  if (!dir.exists(cache.dir)) return(NULL)
  files = c(
    list.files(cache.dir, glob2rx("*.dta"),full.names = TRUE)
  )
  base = basename(files)
  steps = str.between(base,"step_",".") %>% as_integer()
  tibble(step = steps, cache_file = files)
}
```
